job_title: Senior Associate - Data & AI Business Adoption
strengths: Strong Python and SQL hands-on experience
Demonstrated data governance and quality practices
Clear business translation with quantified outcomes
Experience with BI tools (Power BI, Tableau) and cloud warehousing
weaknesses: Limited Financial Services domain tenure (role experience <5 yrs)
No explicit MLOps or production ML lifecycle experience
Little to no GenAI/agentic AI exposure
Unclear experience with structured use-case prioritization process
No explicit history of executive-level presentations or sponsorship securing
improvement_bullets: Developed Power BI and Looker workflows to replace manual written reporting, reducing data mismatches and improving work efficiency by 40% within a financial services context.

Created statistical models to identify high-value customer segments; targeted marketing initiatives informed by these models contributed to a 300% increase in revenue in the targeted segment over 12 months, demonstrating value quantification.

Built Python automation for weekly sales and operations reports (ingesting POS and CRM data), saving 8 hours per week and improving reporting accuracy for faster strategic decisions, aligning with efficiency gains.

Standardized organizational KPIs and data governance frameworks to ensure cross-functional alignment, resulting in a consistent 'single source of truth' for all business stakeholders and a reduction in report discrepancies, addressing data governance and quality needs.

Translated complex technical findings into business recommendations during stakeholder meetings to close the gap between raw data and growth strategy, demonstrating strong communication and business translation skills.
cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am excited to submit my application for the Senior Associate - Data & AI Business Adoption opportunity with JPMorganChase. I am interested in this opportunity because of its focus on building executive partnerships and driving the adoption of advanced data and AI capabilities across a leading financial institution. What interests me about working for JPMorganChase is its long-standing history of innovation and its commitment to leveraging technology to deliver exceptional financial solutions, which excites and inspires me because of my passion for translating complex data into tangible business outcomes.

I believe my proven ability to build data pipelines, my experience in data governance and quality, and my strong stakeholder communication skills would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems with a focus on driving efficiency and measurable impact. In fact, at Shine Masters Cleaning Services, I developed Power BI and Looker workflows that replaced manual reporting, reducing data mismatches and improving work efficiency by 40%. This directly led to more accurate strategic decisions.

Ultimately, I know that the Senior Associate - Data & AI Business Adoption role at JPMorganChase would allow me to bring my expertise in data analysis and process automation to aligning Fusion adoption with priority outcomes and funding. Additionally, my experience as a Data Analyst & Operations Lead at Shine Masters enabled me to develop my stakeholder engagement and business translation skills. I designed and executed A/B tests for digital marketing campaigns, providing statistical evidence to optimize marketing spend and translated complex technical findings into business recommendations during stakeholder meetings, showcasing my ability to communicate value hypotheses and align on business problems.

I’m excited by the opportunity to use my strong Python and SQL skills in working on shaping and prioritizing a high-impact use-case portfolio at JPMorganChase. I know that my ability to translate technical findings into business value and my experience with modern data tooling align with what it takes to succeed in the Senior Associate - Data & AI Business Adoption role.

I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon.

Warm regards,
Justin Miller
